arn.description: Amazon Resource Name used for IAM policies and API operations

ec2_instance_id.description: Identifier of the EC2 instance running the storage gateway

endpoint_type.description: Specifies the type of endpoint for gateway access

gateway_id.description: Unique ID for identifying the storage gateway instance

gateway_network_interface.description: Details of network interfaces including IPv4 addresses

host_environment.description: Deployment environment type for the gateway (e.g., EC2 or VMware)
